object_card.label: old brass key
object_card.symbolic_reading: A worn brass key suggests access, trust, and inherited obligations.

myth_seed.title: The Keeper of the Small Door
myth_seed.personal_resonance: The key mirrors the pressure of carrying access for others.
myth_seed.generation_prompt: Create a small enchanted brass key with worn teeth and a soft green patina.

generated_asset.prompt: Create a small enchanted brass key with worn teeth and a soft green patina.

generation_provenance.selection_reason: Guided scan sent three prepared source images.

npc_agent_traces.name: Archivist Mara
npc_agent_traces.belief: The key belongs to a door that remembers who knocked.
npc_agent_traces.intention: preserve the key's provenance before the town acts
npc_agent_traces.rationale: The archive can prevent the artifact from becoming rumor.

npc_agent_traces.name: Tomas the Smith
npc_agent_traces.belief: The worn teeth show years of urgent use.
npc_agent_traces.intention: test whether the key is physically safe
npc_agent_traces.rationale: The smith trusts material evidence before village legend.

npc_agent_traces.name: Ilo
npc_agent_traces.belief: A small thing can still open a large story.
npc_agent_traces.intention: help the village witness the passage gently
npc_agent_traces.rationale: Ilo believes the relic needs light more than force.

npc_reactions.name: Archivist Mara
npc_reactions.interpretation: The key belongs to a door that remembers who knocked.

npc_reactions.name: Tomas the Smith
npc_reactions.interpretation: The worn teeth show years of urgent use.
npc_reactions.world_change: Fresh filings appear on the workbench.

npc_reactions.name: Ilo
npc_reactions.interpretation: A small thing can still open a large story.
npc_reactions.world_change: A narrow hallway fills with warm light.

world_resolution.summary: The town accepts the key as a shared clue and opens a remembered passage.

accepted_actions.reason: The archive can preserve its provenance.
The passage needs a gentle witness.

rejected_actions.reason: Damaging the key would erase useful wear marks.

print_candidate.approval_reason: The generated key should be reviewed before print preparation.
